items.title: Oil back above $100 as US to blockade Iranian ports after peace talks fail
items.dek: The failure of negotiations at the weekend has raised concerns that the global energy crisis will deepen.
items.body: The failure of negotiations at the weekend has raised concerns that the global energy crisis will deepen.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Orbán era swept away by Péter Magyar's Hungary election landslide
items.dek: Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule is over, defeated by a 45-year-old ex-party insider who convinced a majority of Hungarians to oust him.
items.body: Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule is over, defeated by a 45-year-old ex-party insider who convinced a majority of Hungarians to oust him.
